title: Attention Swimers
wikitext:
[]: Attention Swimers!             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Nov 14, 2005 6:08 pm If you're here because you saw EVA on Adult Swim please make your voice heard. Im intrested in knowing who this applies to and how many of you their are.

[]:             Quote Post by Shadow » Mon Nov 14, 2005 9:37 pm ...I saw it twice...why do you ask?

[]: Re: Attention Swimers!             Quote Post by Shnooks » Mon Nov 14, 2005 9:40 pm DatDude wrote: If you're here because you saw EVA on Adult Swim please make your voice heard. Im intrested in knowing who this applies to and how many of you their are.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Nov 14, 2005 9:42 pm I was excpecting a hord of new people once the series started on AS. Im just juding the amount of people coming our way thats all.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Mon Nov 14, 2005 9:47 pm DatDude wrote: I was excpecting a hord of new people once the series started on AS. Im just juding the amount of people coming our way thats all.

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Mon Nov 14, 2005 9:51 pm Well, the series has just started running on Adult Swim, excpect a horde or newbies shouting, "Wht r thaa last 2 epsodes 'bot? m'ky?" Well, that means brace your self in twelve weeks or so. <.< >.>

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Nov 14, 2005 10:51 pm I don't expect to see much of an influx from Eva's initial episodes. I might see a bunch of new members when the thinpak comes out, and then near when Eva gets towards the later episodes on AS.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Tue Nov 15, 2005 12:31 am Lately we have been getting more members that are active but not a great proportion of the member base is actually posting.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 15, 2005 12:51 am Yeah, but that's true of almost any forum.

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Tue Nov 15, 2005 2:20 am I first saw Evangelion about 6 years ago, in '99. Love at first site... But it seems like I picked an inopportune time to join the board, huh? I, too, expect an unfortunate surge of attention to Evangelion that I hope blows over quickly. I don't mind Eva getting exposure, but I can't help but feel afraid that it will be bastardized by Adult Swim or a bunch of emo, anime idiots will get into the show. The only good I can see coming of it is the (extremely unlikely) release of some Eva games in the States... I love my imports, but what with my whole inability to understand Japanese and all... Speaking of which, if there's anything I can contribute, let me know.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Tue Nov 15, 2005 3:02 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Yeah, but that's true of almost any forum.

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Tue Nov 15, 2005 6:12 am Shnooks wrote: DatDude wrote: I was excpecting a hord of new people once the series started on AS. Im just juding the amount of people coming our way thats all.

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Tue Nov 15, 2005 1:33 pm I didn't join any Eva forums until I finished watching the Perfect Collection series. I don't expect too many new 'Swim members until Rei's character develops a little more and Asuka enters the picture.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 15, 2005 1:37 pm Timesplitter 01 wrote: I think the last time I did a bit of study into the member list less than 10% were actually active a regular basis ( meaning they posted once a weeK at least)

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Tue Nov 15, 2005 7:20 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Once again, that's true of almost any forum. This forum averages 66 posts per day. Quite commendable if you ask me. Especially for a forum with such a segmented interest.
summary:
[]: Attention Swimers!             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Nov 14, 2005 6:08 pm If you're here because you saw EVA on Adult Swim please make your voice heard. Im intrested in knowing who this applies to and how many of you their are.

[]:             Quote Post by Shadow » Mon Nov 14, 2005 9:37 pm ...I saw it twice...why do you ask?
